# Demo Subagent Flow

Use these demo agents to show subagent collaboration:

- `.github/agents/demo-orchestrator.agent.md`
- `.github/agents/demo-planner.agent.md`

## Suggested Live Demo Prompt

```text
Use Demo Orchestrator to coordinate subagents and add one small Todo API feature end-to-end with tests.
```

## What to Show During the Demo

1. Planner creates a scoped, ownership-based plan.
2. Specialized coders implement in non-overlapping file areas.
3. Test Coder adds/updates tests.
4. Reviewer confirms integration and scope.
